task_completion.description: Verify the layout file is created in the correct container location
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'report_map.xml' being created, edited, or copied into the 'layouts' directory of the GeoServer data directory within the 'gs-app' container (e.g., using 'docker exec' or 'docker cp').

task_completion.description: Verify the layout file contains the scaleline decoration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the XML content of 'report_map.xml', specifically showing a '<decoration type="scaleline">' element configured with a bottom-left position and 10px offsets.

task_completion.description: Verify the layout file contains the text decoration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output displaying the XML content of 'report_map.xml', specifically showing a '<decoration type="text">' element configured with a top-right position, 10px offsets, and the message '© Natural Earth Data'.

task_completion.description: Verify the undecorated map image is generated correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or file manager showing '/home/ga/map_undecorated.png'. The image must display a map of world countries (Natural Earth data) with NO scale line or text overlays.

task_completion.description: Verify the decorated map image is generated correctly with the layout applied
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer or file manager showing '/home/ga/map_decorated.png'. The image must display the same map of world countries, but WITH a scale line visible at the bottom-left and the text '© Natural Earth Data' visible at the top-right.

integrity.description: Verify the generated PNG files are actual map images
integrity.visual_evidence: The files 'map_undecorated.png' and 'map_decorated.png' should visually render as geographic maps of countries, not blank images, error messages, or plain text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually edit the images to add decorations
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of image editing software (like GIMP, Pinta, or similar) being used to manually paint the scale line or type the copyright text onto the map image.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with the GeoServer container
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history should show Docker commands (like 'docker exec', 'docker cp', or curl requests to the GeoServer API) proving the layout was deployed to the 'gs-app' container and maps were requested from the server, rather than just mocking the files locally.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The layout file must be named 'report_map.xml' and placed in the 'layouts' subdirectory of the GeoServer data directory. The expected copyright text is exactly '© Natural Earth Data'. The undecorated map should be saved to '/home/ga/map_undecorated.png' and the decorated map to '/home/ga/map_decorated.png'. The map data represents Natural Earth 110m countries (EPSG:4326).
